# Alphagate Docs

## Alphagate Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.alphagate.io/introduction.md)
- [Our Features](https://docs.alphagate.io/overview/our-features.md)
- [Official Links](https://docs.alphagate.io/overview/official-links.md)
- [Extension](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/extension.md)
- [Sidepanel](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/extension/sidepanel.md)
- [Discover](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/discover.md)
- [Followings](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/followings.md)
- [Project](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/project.md)
- [KeyProfile](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/keyprofile.md)
- [Trending](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/trending.md)
- [Feed](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/feed.md)
- [Watchlist](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/watchlist.md): You are able to add Projects and key profiles to your watchlist, refer to the sections below for more details!
- [Projects](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/watchlist/projects.md)
- [Key profiles](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/watchlist/key-profiles.md)
- [Preferences](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/watchlist/preferences.md)
- [Telegram Bot](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/telegram-bot.md)
- [Chat](https://docs.alphagate.io/features/chat.md)
- [Referrals](https://docs.alphagate.io/other/referrals.md)
- [Discord Role](https://docs.alphagate.io/other/discord-role.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.alphagate.io/introduction.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
